meta.task_description: Research the given topic thoroughly using web search, source extraction, and structured synthesis.

scoping.instructions: Break the research question into 3-5 specific sub-queries. List them clearly. Do NOT search yet. The campaign executor tracks scope in the recitation block.

searching.instructions: Execute each sub-query via web search. Collect URLs and snippets into filesystem memory for persistence across phases. Do NOT synthesize yet — just gather raw results.

extracting.instructions: Fetch the top 5-10 most relevant URLs. Extract key facts, quotes, and data points. Record source URL for each fact. Store extracted data in filesystem memory for the synthesizing phase.

synthesizing.instructions: Synthesize all extracted data into a structured answer. Use tables where appropriate. Cite sources inline. Flag gaps or conflicting information. Write the final output. The campaign executor's verification gate will audit citations.

verifying.instructions: Review the synthesis for accuracy. Verify that every claim has a cited source. Check for hallucinated facts. If gaps found, note them explicitly. The verification gate blocks completion until all claims are sourced.

review.instructions: Auto-crítica del output de research: ¿citas verificables? ¿sin afirmaciones sin fuente? ¿contradicciones resueltas? ¿formato estructurado? codegraph_explore no aplica para research.

accept.instructions: RATCHETED DOD v${dod_version}. Leer dod_version del workflow. V1: todas las afirmaciones citadas ✅, sin alucinaciones ✅, formato estructurado ✅, gaps documentados ✅, fuentes verificables ✅. V2+: +ponytail-review, +no secrets. V3+: +citas con URL verificada. Si todas ✅ → ACCEPTED.

close.instructions: Guardar output final en docs/research/. skill progreso (Trigger 1). Context Save Point.
